table_slice: Global finite structural budget; world_count=32; route_length=12; budget_ratio=0.25/0.50/0.75/1.00/1.25
main_metric_summary: Composition accuracy rises from 0.276 at budget_ratio=0.25 to 0.517 at 0.50, 0.758 at 0.75, and 1.000 at exact/surplus budget levels.
manuscript_use: Descriptive support for finite-budget degradation; Figure 4 remains supplement-default unless emphasized.
caveat: Observed finite-budget degradation only. No fitted capacity law. Local-vs-global C7 is not promoted without paired seed-level analysis.

table_slice: Symbolic transition-cue selection; world_count=32; route_length=16; cue_count=8; corruption_rate=0.00/0.10/0.25/0.50
main_metric_summary: CIRM latent selector reaches 1.000 world-selection/seen-composition accuracy at corruption 0.00 and 0.10, 0.999 at 0.25, and 0.942 at 0.50. Oracle context-gated lookup remains 1.000. Shared no-context lookup fails first-step/seen-route metrics near chance while suffix probes can remain misleadingly high.
manuscript_use: Main-narrow descriptive support for Figure 5 and C13.
caveat: Symbolic transition-cue selection only, not raw sensory latent-world discovery. Oracle context-gated lookup remains an upper-bound control.
